Reverts with a specific error if confirmation fails, which blocks         the market from resolving until the issue is fixed.","params":{"assetIndex":"HyperCore asset index"},"returns":{"confirmed":"  The verified settlement price to use"}},"pushPrice(uint32,uint256,string)":{"params":{"assetIndex":"HyperCore asset index (0=BTC, 11=XAG, 12=XAU, etc.)","price":"6-decimal USD price (e.g. 5_171_000_000 = $5,171)","source":"Human-readable source label (\"Coinbase\", \"Kitco\", etc.)"}}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"checkPrice(uint32)":{"notice":"Read-only version \u2014 check if a price would pass confirmation         without reverting. Used by the off-chain script to monitor."},"confirmPrice(uint32)":{"notice":"The main function \u2014 confirms a price is valid before resolution."},"getPriceHistory(uint32)":{"notice":"Get price history for an asset \u2014 useful for spotting         manipulation attempts (sudden spikes that disappear)."},"pushPrice(uint32,uint256,string)":{"notice":"Push a secondary price from an external source.         Called by the off-chain monitoring script every 60s."},"pushPriceBatch(uint32[],uint256[],string)":{"notice":"Batch push \u2014 more gas efficient for the monitoring script         updating multiple assets in one tx."}},"notice":"\u2554\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2557 \u2551         HYPERFLEX \u2014 Dual Oracle Price Aggregator                 \u2551 \u2551                                                                  \u2551 \u2551  Two-source price confirmation before any market can resolve.   \u2551 \u2551                                                                  \u2551 \u2551  Source A: HyperCore precompile (primary \u2014 on-chain, trustless) \u2551 \u2551  Source B: Permissioned price feeder (secondary \u2014 off-chain     \u2551 \u2551            script pulls from Coinbase/Binance/Kitco APIs and    \u2551 \u2551            posts on-chain via pushPrice())                       \u2551 \u2551                                                                  \u2551 \u2551  Resolution is only allowed when:                                \u2551 \u2551    1. Both prices are fresh (within MAX_PRICE_AGE seconds)      \u2551 \u2551    2. Both prices agree within MAX_DEVIATION (default 1%)       \u2551 \u2551    3. Neither price is zero                                      \u2551 \u2551                                                                  \u2551 \u2551  If the two sources disagree by more than MAX_DEVIATION:        \u2551 \u2551    \u2192 resolution is blocked                                       \u2551 \u2551    \u2192 a PriceDeviation event fires                               \u2551 \u2551    \u2192 humans are alerted to investigate before resolving         \u2551 \u2551                                                                  \u2551 \u2551  Circuit breaker: if either oracle hasn't been updated in       \u2551 \u2551  MAX_PRICE_AGE, all resolutions halt until prices refresh.      \u2551 \u255a\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u255d","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/HyperFlexPriceAggregator.sol":"HyperFlexPriceAggregator"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/HyperFlexPriceAggregator.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb0ec00113f55242c3275f2a8870c9a368239c8031d58e36556fd738209be2066","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://10780d04992c568881b9ebbe36a0a324cf3682b458c4f97810331a20129ec12d","dweb:/ipfs/QmaN88ZxrryEbv2Pc9mToJPKJUsqLrW9n9TSWrqimpD5ih"]},"src/interfaces/IHyperCoreOracle.sol":{"keccak256":"0x77874b1ca040c1c414b1766e72fa258e0ec82c6a6eba7d46861f921f9d999f88","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://704bb82b6ae31027ba4a0c9e19ebea07132d3254dd382b48cd4f35f6da63478d","dweb:/ipfs/QmSVUeWJnT39anmhzLGoA1EHA545MXzR89dvHGgujXY32E"]}},"version":1}

returns.ok: true if both sources agree and are fresh

confirmPrice(uint32).details: Returns the confirmed price (average of both sources if they agree).         Reverts with a specific error if confirmation fails, which blocks         the market from resolving until the issue is fixed.

returns.confirmed: The verified settlement price to use

checkPrice(uint32).notice: Read-only version — check if a price would pass confirmation         without reverting. Used by the off-chain script to monitor.

confirmPrice(uint32).notice: The main function — confirms a price is valid before resolution.

getPriceHistory(uint32).notice: Get price history for an asset — useful for spotting         manipulation attempts (sudden spikes that disappear).

pushPrice(uint32,uint256,string).notice: Push a secondary price from an external source.         Called by the off-chain monitoring script every 60s.

pushPriceBatch(uint32[],uint256[],string.notice: Batch push — more gas efficient for the monitoring script         updating multiple assets in one tx.
